source: translate English to Oku: So they sat down in groups of hundreds and fifties.
target: Ghene me diom & ngoose & ngoose, nɛ ngoo selee lu ghel abvie ne selee lu ghel əmmtan.

source: translate Oku to English: Jesus me fise se ghene ge: "Neeyeen geese ge ghen ye jame ɛ eychie-ndaa nchichi. Mɛ suuy se ghen ge ghel sê eydio nǎǎ ye koŋen ge ghene ye jame, dí ghene băǎ se neey mok-a.
target: He said to them, "Make every effort to enter through the narrow door, because many, I tell you, will try to enter and will not be able to.

source: translate Oku to English: Ye lu we ge ghele jia fiisen ghen naa ghááy, è jia yiote kenǝǝ ke ghene suuyen, ghene loo lòò se ntek fo, ghen tete kebvəl se ghen ə evəə ka əbchǝyte se din ge kenǝǝ ke ghene nɛɛyen báà jof.
target: "And if any place will not welcome you or listen to you, leave that place and shake the dust off your feet as a testimony against them."

source: translate English to Oku: By this time it was late in the day, so his disciples came to him. "This is a remote place," they said, "and it’s already very late."
target: Ney se lu ne ǝbtəke se jie, ghon-eyfel nə wene kokte è gwiy è suuy se wen ge: Əbliye chiamen, ne ghesen lu fen e ǝbkwak.
